{"file_path":"/home/runner/work/Kody-Engine-Tester/Kody-Engine-Tester/.kody/tasks/2650-260418-100454/plan.md","content":"# Plan: Taskify — Task 2650-260418-100454

## Context

This is the `taskify` classification stage of the Kody pipeline. The goal is to classify the task described in `task.md` as valid JSON, determining `task_type`, `title`, `description`, `scope`, `risk_level`, `existing_patterns`, and `questions`.

**Task being classified**: Replace the entire session-based authentication system with JWT-based authentication. Migrate the user schema to include `jwt_secret`, `exp`, and `iat` fields. Add RBAC with admin/editor/viewer roles. Update all API routes to use the new auth middleware. Run database migrations.

**P1T03 purpose**: This task also serves as a pipeline verification test — it should be classified as HIGH complexity so the Kody risk gate triggers and pauses the pipeline at the `plan` stage.
